description_long: This radiator features a robust, industrial design with two thick, dark vertical end supports and four evenly spaced horizontal bars running between them. The horizontal bars are a light yellow-green color, contrasting with the dark gray or black end supports, and are likely made of metal for efficient heat transfer. The end supports are wide and flat at the base, providing stability for floor mounting. The overall structure is open, with no visible grille or cover, and the bars are smooth and cylindrical. There are no visible valves or adjustment mechanisms, suggesting a simple, utilitarian design. The radiator's form is functional, likely intended for use in public or semi-public urban environments such as garages, workshops, or industrial spaces.
description: A sturdy, industrial-style radiator with four light yellow-green horizontal bars and thick dark end supports, designed for floor mounting. The open, minimalist structure emphasizes durability and efficient heat dissipation.
description_view_0: Front view showing four evenly spaced horizontal bars between two thick, dark vertical supports.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the horizontal bars and the depth of the end supports.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same four horizontal bars and end supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the structure of the end supports.
